parameters:
Light a bonfire? (You can save and return at the
bonfire.)

You need a torch to light a bonfire (Make one at the
workbench.)

events.name: 初めてのザコ戦イベント用

parameters:
Ahh~ The air is so fresh! It's totally different from
the city~ Maybe I should just take a forest bath or
something.

What are you saying so carefreely! \V[3]...! Behind
you, behind you...!
Wh...what the...! What is this bastard!?

Wh...what was that just now? A plant with legs...
A hallucination...? Or is it still a dream...?

Haa... haa... But that was easy... Just a tutorial mob
after all. Haa... haa...
You're panting so hard, it doesn't seem easy at all...

Battles are random encounters. The \c[14]escape
success rate for mob battles is 100%\c[0], so if
things look bad, just run away.
I need a scythe... Let's make it at the workbench.
This one has too little fur, let's find another sheep.
Go fishing? (You need a fishing rod and worms)

You don't have a fishing rod, let's make one at the
workbench
